Table of Contents

Interface IFrameXform

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a standard frame camera transform.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("68F50E4B-6E2D-4950-BD52-D9646ACC8A97")]
public interface IFrameXform : IGeodataXform

Indicates if the adjustment of earth curvature and refraction is applied.
